title: Flexible Manufacturing ROI Calculator
description: Calculates the return on investment for implementing flexible manufacturing systems, considering setup time reduction, changeover costs, inventory savings, and capacity utilization improvements.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced per year across all product variants.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced per year across all product variants.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm ürün varyantlarında yılda üretilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Jahr produzierten Einheiten über alle Produktvarianten hinweg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites par an toutes variantes de produit confondues.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades producidas por año en todas las variantes de producto.

inputs.label: Average Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Average number of units produced per production run before changeover.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of units produced per production run before changeover.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değişim öncesi üretim partisi başına üretilen ortalama birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl der pro Produktionslauf produzierten Einheiten vor dem Rüstwechsel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen d'unités produites par série de production avant changement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de unidades producidas por lote de producción antes del cambio de referencia.

inputs.label: Current Setup Time per Changeover
inputs.businessContext: Time required to change from one product to another in the current system.

label_i18n.fr: Temps de réglage actuel par changement
label_i18n.es: Tiempo actual de preparación por cambio de referencia

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to change from one product to another in the current system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut sistemde bir üründen diğerine geçiş için gereken süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, die benötigt wird, um im aktuellen System von einem Produkt auf ein anderes umzustellen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps nécessaire pour passer d'un produit à un autre dans le système actuel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo requerido para cambiar de un producto a otro en el sistema actual.

inputs.label: Target Setup Time per Changeover (after FMS)
inputs.businessContext: Expected setup time after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

label_i18n.en: Target Setup Time per Changeover (after FMS)
label_i18n.fr: Temps de réglage cible par changement (après FMS)
label_i18n.es: Tiempo objetivo de preparación por cambio de referencia (después del FMS)

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected setup time after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Esnek üretim sistemi (örneğin SMED) uygulandıktan sonra beklenen değişim süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Rüstzeit nach Implementierung eines flexiblen Fertigungssystems (z. B. SMED).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de réglage attendu après la mise en œuvre d'un système de fabrication flexible (ex. SMED).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de preparación esperado después de implementar el sistema de fabricación flexible (ej. SMED).

inputs.label: Hourly Operating Cost (labor + overhead)
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly cost of production labor and overhead.

label_i18n.es: Costo operativo por hora (mano de obra + gastos generales)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly cost of production labor and overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam yüklü saatlik üretim işçiliği ve genel gider maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belastete stündliche Kosten für Produktionsarbeit und Gemeinkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire complet de la main-d'œuvre de production et des frais généraux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo horario totalmente cargado de mano de obra de producción y gastos generales.

inputs.label: Changeover Cost per Hour (downtime + labor)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost incurred per hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de changement par heure (temps d'arrêt + main-d'œuvre)
label_i18n.es: Costo de cambio de referencia por hora (tiempo de inactividad + mano de obra)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost incurred per hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kayıp üretim ve işçilik dahil olmak üzere değişim saati başına toplam maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten pro Stunde Rüstzeit, einschließlich Produktionsausfall und Arbeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total encouru par heure de changement, incluant la perte de production et la main-d'œuvre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total incurrido por hora de cambio de referencia, incluyendo producción perdida y mano de obra.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of inventory value (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

label_i18n.fr: Taux de coût de détention des stocks
label_i18n.es: Tasa de costo de mantenimiento de inventario

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of inventory value (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Envanter değerinin yüzdesi olarak yıllık envanter bulundurma maliyeti (depolama, sigorta, eskime dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Kosten für die Lagerhaltung als Prozentsatz des Lagerwerts (inklusive Lagerung, Versicherung, Veralterung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel de détention des stocks en pourcentage de la valeur des stocks (inclut stockage, assurance, obsolescence).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual de mantener inventario como porcentaje del valor del inventario (incluye almacenamiento, seguros, obsolescencia).

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value (current)
inputs.businessContext: Current average value of raw materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current average value of raw materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hammadde, YDİ ve mamul envanterinin mevcut ortalama değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Durchschnittswert der Rohmaterial-, Umlauf- und Fertigwarenbestände.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur moyenne actuelle des matières premières, des encours et des produits finis.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor promedio actual de materias primas, productos en proceso y productos terminados.

rules.message: Target setup time must be less than current setup time to realize savings.
Average batch size must be greater than zero.
FMS investment must be greater than zero.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 30%.

thresholds.alert: Negative ROI detected. Review assumptions or consider alternative investments.
Payback period exceeds useful life of FMS. Investment may not be viable.
Setup time reduction is less than 50%. Consider more aggressive SMED techniques.
Inventory savings are less than 10% of FMS investment. Re-evaluate inventory reduction potential.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
